T5.prompt: I want to lose fat but I have a history of lower back pain. What can I do?
T5.equivalence_reason: All three responses provide similar advice on consulting a doctor, focusing on low-impact exercises, and emphasizing gradual progression and nutrition, while ensuring safety for someone with a history of lower back pain.
